fragment.choose:
<when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("piiAnonymizationEnabled") == "true")">
            
            <set-variable name="piiConfidenceThreshold" value="@(double.Parse(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("piiConfidenceThreshold", "0.8")))" />
            <set-variable name="piiEntityCategoryExclusions" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("piiEntityCategoryExclusions", ""))" />
            <set-variable name="piiDetectionLanguage" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("piiDetectionLanguage", "en"))" />
            
            
            
            <set-variable name="piiRegexMappings" value="@{
                var content = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("piiInputContent");
                var regexPatterns = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("piiRegexPatterns");
                var mappings = new JArray();
                
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(regexPatterns))
                {
                    var patterns = JArray.Parse(regexPatterns);
                    var categoryCounts = new Dictionary();
                    var processedTexts = new HashSet(); // Track already processed texts
                    
                    foreach (var pattern in patterns)
                    {
                        var regex = new Regex(pattern["pattern"].ToString());
                        var category = pattern["category"].ToString();
                        
                        if (!categoryCounts.ContainsKey(category))
                        {
                            categoryCounts[category] = 0;
                        }
                        
                        var matches = regex.Matches(content);
                        foreach (Match match in matches)
                        {
                            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(match.Value))
                            {
                                // Skip if we already have a mapping for this text
                                if (processedTexts.Contains(match.Value))
                                {
                                    continue;
                                }
                                
                                var placeholder = $"<{category}_{categoryCounts[category]}>";
                                mappings.Add(new JObject {
                                    ["original"] = match.Value,
                                    ["placeholder"] = placeholder,
                                    ["source"] = "regex"
                                });
                                categoryCounts[category]++;
                                processedTexts.Add(match.Value); // Mark this text as processed
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                return mappings.ToString();
            }" />

            
            <set-variable name="piiRegexProcessedContent" value="@{
                var content = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("piiInputContent");
                var mappings = JArray.Parse(
                    context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("piiRegexMappings"));
                
                foreach (var mapping in mappings)
                {
                    content = content.Replace(
                        mapping["original"].ToString(),
                        mapping["placeholder"].ToString()
                    );
                }
                return content;
            }" />

            
            <set-variable name="piiInputContent" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("piiRegexProcessedContent"))" />
            
            
            
                @{
                    var baseUrl = "{{piiServiceUrl}}".TrimEnd('/');
                    return baseUrl + "/language/:analyze-text?api-version=2026-05-01";
                }
                POST
                
                    application/json
                
                
                    @("Bearer " + (string)context.Variables["msi-access-token"])
                
                

                @{
                    var request = new JObject();
                    request["kind"] = "PiiEntityRecognition";
                    request["parameters"] = new JObject{
                        {"modelVersion", "latest"},
                        {"redactionPolicy", new JObject{
                            {"policyKind", "CharacterMask"},
                            {"redactionCharacter", "#"}
                        }}
                    };
                    request["analysisInput"] = new JObject{
                        {"documents", new JArray{
                            new JObject{
                                {"text", context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("piiInputContent")},
                                {"id", "1"},
                                {"language", context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("piiDetectionLanguage")}
                            }
                        }}
                    };
                    return request.ToString();
                }
            

            
            <set-variable name="piiAnalysisFailureReason" value="@{
                var response = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("piiAnalysisResponse");
                if (response == null)
                {
                    return "PII service call failed: no response received (timeout or connectivity issue).";
                }
                if (response.StatusCode < 200 || response.StatusCode >= 300)
                {
                    var body = string.Empty;
                    try { body = response.Body?.As(preserveContent: true) ?? string.Empty; } catch { }
                    return $"PII service returned non-success status {response.StatusCode} {response.StatusReason}. Body: {body}";
                }
                try
                {
                    var parsed = JObject.Parse(response.Body.As(preserveContent: true));
                    var errors = parsed.SelectToken("$.results.errors") as JArray;
                    if (errors != null && errors.Count > 0)
                    {
                        return $"PII service reported document errors: {errors.ToString(Newtonsoft.Json.Formatting.None)}";
                    }
                    var entitiesToken = parsed.SelectToken("$.results.documents[0].entities");
                    if (entitiesToken == null)
                    {
                        return "PII service response did not contain expected entities payload.";
                    }
                    return string.Empty;
                }
                catch (Exception ex)
                {
                    return $"Failed to parse PII service response: {ex.Message}";
                }
            }" />

            
                <when condition="@(!string.IsNullOrEmpty(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("piiAnalysisFailureReason")))">
                    
                    
                        @($"PII anonymization degraded: {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("piiAnalysisFailureReason")}")
                        
                        
                        
                        <metadata name="piiServiceStatusCode" value="@(((IResponse)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("piiAnalysisResponse"))?.StatusCode.ToString() ?? "n/a")" />
                        <metadata name="continueOnNLPError" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("continueOnNLPError", "false"))" />
                    
                    
                        
                        <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("continueOnNLPError", "false").Equals("true", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) == false)">
                            
                                
                                
                                    application/json
                                
                                @{
                                    var error = new JObject {
                                        ["error"] = new JObject {
                                            ["code"] = "PIIAnonymizationFailed",
                                            ["message"] = "The PII anonymization service is currently unavailable and 'continueOnNLPError' is disabled. Request was blocked to prevent unmasked content from reaching the backend.",
                                            ["details"] = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("piiAnalysisFailureReason"),
                                            ["requestId"] = context.RequestId.ToString()
                                        }
                                    };
                                    return error.ToString();
                                }
                            
                        
                        
                            
                            <set-variable name="piiMappings" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("piiRegexMappings") ?? "[]")" />
                        
                    
                
                
                    
                    <set-variable name="piiMappings" value="@{
                        var response = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("piiAnalysisResponse");
                        var confidenceThreshold = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("piiConfidenceThreshold");
                        var exclusions = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("piiEntityCategoryExclusions")
                            .Split(new[] { ',' }, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries)
                            .Select(c => c.Trim())
                            .ToList();

                        var entitiesToken = JObject.Parse(response.Body.As())
                            .SelectToken("$.results.documents[0].entities");
                        var entitiesArray = entitiesToken as JArray ?? new JArray();

                        var entities = entitiesArray
                            .Where(e => e["confidenceScore"] != null && e["confidenceScore"].Value() >= confidenceThreshold)
                            .Where(e => !exclusions.Contains(e["category"]?.ToString() ?? string.Empty))
                            .OrderByDescending(e => (e["text"]?.ToString() ?? string.Empty).Length);

                        var mappings = new JArray();
                        var categoryCounts = new Dictionary();
                        var processedTexts = new HashSet(); // Track already processed texts

                        foreach (var entity in entities) {
                            var text = (entity["text"]?.ToString() ?? string.Empty).TrimEnd('.', ',', ' ');
                            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(text)) { continue; }

                            // Skip if this text has already been processed
                            if (processedTexts.Contains(text)) {
                                continue;
                            }

                            var category = entity["category"].ToString();

                            if (!categoryCounts.ContainsKey(category)) {
                                categoryCounts[category] = 0;
                            }

                            var placeholder = $"<{category}_{categoryCounts[category]}>";
                            mappings.Add(new JObject {
                                ["original"] = text,
                                ["placeholder"] = placeholder
                            });

                            categoryCounts[category]++;
                            processedTexts.Add(text); // Mark this text as processed
                        }

                        return mappings.ToString();
                    }" />
                
            

            
            <set-variable name="piiMappings" value="@{
                var apiMappings = JArray.Parse(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("piiMappings") ?? "[]");
                var regexMappings = JArray.Parse(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("piiRegexMappings") ?? "[]");
                
                foreach (var mapping in regexMappings)
                {
                    apiMappings.Add(mapping);
                }
                
                return apiMappings.ToString();
            }" />

            
            <set-variable name="piiAnonymizedContent" value="@{
                var content = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("piiInputContent");
                var mappings = JArray.Parse(
                    context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("piiMappings"));
                    
                foreach (var mapping in mappings) {
                    var original = mapping["original"].ToString();
                    var placeholder = mapping["placeholder"].ToString();
                    content = content.Replace(original, placeholder);
                }
                
                return content;
            }" />
        
        
            
            <set-variable name="piiAnonymizedContent" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("piiInputContent"))" />
